Block.Para: An Act to amend the National Housing Act (Canada Mortgage and Housing Corporation's retained earnings)

Also available on the Parliament of Canada Web Site at the following address:
http://www.parl.gc.ca

This enactment amends the National Housing Act to provide that CMHCâs retained earnings from the mortgage insurance business that are not credited to funds established for claims, losses, expenditures and costs are capitalized up to a maximum of 150% of the Minimum Capital Test or are transferred to the provinces for the purpose of providing housing for families of low income.

Bill_Part.RunningHead_E: Housing (Canada Mortgage and Housing Corporation's retained earnings)

Block.Para: An Act to amend the National Housing Act (Canada Mortgage and Housing Corporation's retained earnings)
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Para.B: Paragraphs 21(2)(a) to (d) of the National Housing Act are replaced by the following:

Block.Para: (a) the capitalization of the Corporationâs Mortgage Insurance Fund under this Part up to a maximum of 150% of the Minimum Capital Test recommended by the Office of the Superintendent of Financial Institutions; and
(b) the transfer of all remaining funds to the provinces for the purpose of providing housing for families of low income.

Published under authority of the Speaker of the House of Commons
